memories.content: User is building an engineering-oriented GitHub project that uses AI APIs.
The project aims to implement a long-term context memory system that continuously extracts key information from conversations and saves part of it as a core file similar to a system prompt.
User wants to run a minimal viable version of the long-term context memory system tonight.

The user has implemented a V1 version of the long-term memory system with: multi-turn CLI conversation, conversation persistence, structured memory persistence, basic memory extraction, simple deduplication/merging, and memory viewing.
